name: Cevapcici (Cevaps for Short)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Shape into thumb-sized sausages or croquette-size shapes.
3. Grill on an open grill until fully cooked through.
4. Serve with pita bread or hard rolls, and onions (raw or sautéed).
5. Traditionally, these are not served in barbecue sauce.
